chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 901 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.5 & 20. 2. For orders on CMA No.3847/2017. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.3848/2017. 29.09.2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. This reference is pending since 2017 without any progress and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 11.01.2024, following order was passed: “11.01.2024 Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Applicant. Counsel holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate, and requests for adjournment as she is unwell. However, she is directed to come prepared and assist the Court as to how a single Reference Application has been filed against various Respondents, whose different appeals were decided by the Tribunal. Adjourned.” Today, no response has been filed to the earlier Order and merely adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
